name: Cotton Velvet Duvet Cover and Sham Set - Threshold™
description:
Simple elegance and luxurious comfort make this Solid Velvet Duvet Cover & Sham Set from Threshold™ a wonderful choice for any bedroom. Made from a soft and cozy velvet fabric, the set includes a duvet cover and two pillow shams. The solid-colored design makes it extremely versatile, easily complementing a variety of decor styles.

Casual classics for house and home.
